name: SOC 2
description: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria (Optional) - Security, Availability, Confidentiality for service organizations

requirements.requirement_text: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values.
requirements.expected_evidence: Code of conduct, ethics policy, employee acknowledgment
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish and communicate a code of conduct with ethics training for all personnel.

requirements.requirement_text: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight of system controls.
requirements.expected_evidence: Board charter, governance documentation, oversight meeting records
requirements.recommendation_text: Document board/management oversight responsibilities for internal control over systems.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal control.
requirements.expected_evidence: Internal communication procedures, control documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Ensure quality security and operational information flows to those responsible for controls.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risks.
requirements.expected_evidence: Risk assessment documentation, security objectives
requirements.recommendation_text: Define clear security objectives and conduct formal risk assessments annually.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity identifies risks to the achievement of its objectives and analyzes risks as a basis for determining how to manage them.
requirements.expected_evidence: Risk register, risk analysis reports, threat modeling
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain a risk register with analyzed risks and treatment plans reviewed quarterly.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks.
requirements.expected_evidence: Control matrix mapping risks to controls, control documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Map identified risks to specific control activities and verify effectiveness.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets.
requirements.expected_evidence: Access control policy, IAM configuration, access review records
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement comprehensive logical access controls with authentication and authorization.

requirements.requirement_text: Prior to issuing system credentials and granting system access, the entity registers and authorizes new users.
requirements.expected_evidence: User provisioning procedures, authorization records
requirements.recommendation_text: Require formal authorization before granting system access to new users.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity removes access to protected information assets when appropriate.
requirements.expected_evidence: Offboarding procedures, access removal records, termination checklists
requirements.recommendation_text: Revoke all system access promptly upon employee termination or role change.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from sources outside its system boundaries.
requirements.expected_evidence: Network security architecture, firewall/WAF configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy perimeter security controls including firewalls and WAF to protect system boundaries.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users and processes.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data transmission policy, encryption configuration, DLP controls
requirements.recommendation_text: Encrypt data in transit and restrict data movement to authorized channels.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software.
requirements.expected_evidence: Anti-malware deployment, EDR configuration, detection logs
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy endpoint protection and intrusion detection across all production systems.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify changes to configurations and new vulnerabilities.
requirements.expected_evidence: Configuration monitoring tools, vulnerability scanning, change detection alerts
requirements.recommendation_text: Monitor system configurations and vulnerabilities with automated detection and alerting.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity monitors system components and the operation of controls to detect anomalies indicative of malicious acts or system failures.
requirements.expected_evidence: SIEM configuration, monitoring dashboards, alert procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement continuous monitoring with SIEM to detect anomalies and security events.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they could or have resulted in a failure of controls.
requirements.expected_evidence: Incident response procedures, event evaluation records
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish procedures to evaluate security events and determine control impact.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response program.
requirements.expected_evidence: Incident response plan, incident records, post-incident reviews
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain and test an incident response program with defined roles and communication plans.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure and software.
requirements.expected_evidence: Change management policy, change records, CAB meeting minutes
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement formal change management with authorization, testing, and approval before production deployment.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from vendor and business partner relationships.
requirements.expected_evidence: Vendor risk assessment, third-party management policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Assess vendor security posture before engagement and monitor ongoing compliance.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity maintains, monitors, and evaluates current processing capacity and use of system components to manage capacity demand.
requirements.expected_evidence: Capacity planning documentation, performance monitoring dashboards
requirements.recommendation_text: Monitor system capacity and plan for demand to maintain availability SLAs.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, implements, maintains, and monitors environmental protections, software, and recovery infrastructure.
requirements.expected_evidence: DR plan, backup procedures, HA architecture documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement DR/HA infrastructure with tested recovery procedures meeting availability commitments.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.
requirements.expected_evidence: Confidential data inventory, classification policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Identify and classify all confidential information with appropriate handling requirements.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity disposes of confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data disposal procedures, destruction certificates
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement secure disposal procedures for confidential information at end of retention.

requirements.requirement_text: The entity obtains or generates, uses, and communicates relevant, quality information regarding the processing of data.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data validation procedures, processing integrity controls
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement data validation and quality checks throughout processing pipelines.
